DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF AHMAD ALHAKIM'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS MOOT SINCE DEFENDANT HAS PROVIDED VERIFICATIONS. THE COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF $650 IN SANCTIONS GIVEN THAT THE VERIFICATIONS WERE PROVIDED ONLY AFTER THIS MOTION WAS FILED. SANCTIONS TO BE PAID BY NOVEMBER 2, 2018. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING BY EMAIL TO JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD AT DAVIDMCDONALD@PRODIGY.NET. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AHMAD ALHAKIM's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Sanctions.

The motion to compel is moot since Defendant has provided verifications. The Court awards Plaintiff $650 in sanctions given that the verifications were provided only after this motion was filed. Sanctions to be paid by November 2, 2018.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling by email to Judge Pro Tem David McDonald at davidmcdonald@prodigy.net.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
